About: It is about a cooperative board game.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Adam Poots.
ConsistsOf: It consists of miniatures, monster-specific cards, and gear cards.
CreatedBy: It was created by Adam Poots.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Adam Poots.
HasA: It has a Hunt Phase.
It has a Showdown Phase.
It has a Settlement Phase.
It has a finale.
It has expansions.
It has gear cards.
It has settlement locations.
It has settlement events.
It has AI cards.
It has Hit Location cards.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by cooperative gameplay.
It is characterized by a steep learning curve.
It is characterized by high cost.
It is characterized by quality production.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Warhammer Quest.
IsA: It is a cooperative board game.
It is a boutique board game.
KnownFor: It is known for its high cost.
It is known for its quality production.
It is known for its brutal gameplay.
It is known for its estimated playing time.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the 2016 American Thanksgiving holiday weekend.
PublishedAs: It was published as Kingdom Death: Monster 1.5.
It was published as Kingdom Death: Monster 1.6.
UsedFor: It is used for crafting new gear.
It is used for discovering new abilities.
It is used for adding to settlement locations.
UsedIn: It is used in the Hunt Phase.
It is used in the Showdown Phase.
It is used in the Settlement Phase.
UsedTo: It is used to populate the game board with terrain tiles.
It is used to determine if a hit is made.
It is used to determine if the monster is wounded.
It is used to upgrade existing editions.
